word: G1474 - ἐδαφίζω - edaphízō - ed-af-id'-zo - Lay even with the ground

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐδαφίζω

- Transliteration: Edaphizo

- Phonetic: ed-af-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to throw to the ground

a. both of cities and buildings, to raze, level with the earth

b. metaph. of men

- Origin: from G1475

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1475; to raze: - lay even with the ground.
